context: Tests whether the agent correctly generates UTM tracking links with the exact required parameters, generates discount codes following the HANDLE15 naming pattern, sets up the CampaignBrief structure with FTC compliance, and creates participant records with the correct initial status.

checklist.name: utm_source value
checklist.description: The generated tracking links include utm_source=influencer (not a brand name or other value)

checklist.name: utm_medium value
checklist.description: The generated tracking links include utm_medium=social

checklist.name: utm_campaign format
checklist.description: The utm_campaign parameter is the campaign name lowercased with spaces replaced by dashes (e.g., 'spring-glow')

checklist.name: utm_content per creator
checklist.description: The utm_content parameter uses the creator's Instagram handle (or falls back to their ID), making each tracking link unique

checklist.name: discount code format
checklist.description: Discount codes follow the HANDLE15 pattern — the Instagram handle uppercased (without @) followed by '15' (e.g., GLOWWITHSARAH15)

checklist.name: five unique discount codes
checklist.description: All 5 participants have distinct discount codes based on their individual Instagram handles

checklist.name: participant initial status
checklist.description: Each participant record has status set to 'briefed' (not 'active', 'pending', or any other value)

checklist.name: compensationDue field
checklist.description: Each participant record includes a compensationDue field set to 500

checklist.name: FTC disclosure in brief
checklist.description: The brief or brief-summary includes a requirement for #ad or #sponsored disclosure on all posts

checklist.name: mandatoryTags in brief
checklist.description: The CampaignBrief structure includes a mandatoryTags field (as an array)

checklist.name: forbiddenContent in brief
checklist.description: The CampaignBrief structure includes a forbiddenContent field (as an array)

checklist.name: compensationType field
checklist.description: The brief uses one of the valid compensationType values: 'gifting', 'flat-fee', 'commission', or 'hybrid'

checklist.name: participants.json generated
checklist.description: A participants.json file is present with an array of 5 objects, one per creator
